title: His Hope Or Sheet Anchor.
content:
Among these tempests great and manifold
    My ship has here one only anchor-hold;
    That is my hope, which if that slip, I'm one
    Wildered in this vast wat'ry region.
meaning:
"His Hope Or Sheet Anchor." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
